name: American Express Co.
lede: Amex runs six centers across five Indian cities. Gurugram, Bengaluru, Mumbai, New Delhi and Chennai, covering GBS, CoE and GCC/GIC, built over 32 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amex office in India. We map six, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: American Express Co. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amex runs 6 verified centers across 5 Indian cities (Gurugram, Bengaluru, Mumbai, New Delhi, Chennai), covering GBS, CoE and GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Amex's India footprint covers Gurugram, Bengaluru, Mumbai, New Delhi and Chennai, spanning GBS, CoE and GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 297 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Amex operate in India?
faq.a: Amex operates 6 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Amex have centers in?
faq.a: Amex's India footprint includes Gurugram and 4 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Amex run in India?
faq.a: Amex runs GBS and 2 additional center types in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Amex's India centers?

faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Amex's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.
